name: Zucchini Pudding
recipeIngredient: 3 cups zucchini, skin on and small diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and coriander. Blend well and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add zucchini, jalapeno, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Cook, stirring for 2 minutes.
5. Remove from heat.
6. In a large bowl, beat eggs until blended. Mix in milk, sour cream, and cheese.
7. Add reserved dry ingredients and blend well.
8. Add zucchini mixture and mix well.
9. Pour into a buttered 9-inch square dish.
10. Bake for 40 minutes.
